name: Sougou Shouken Co.,Ltd.
summary: Sougou Shouken Co.,Ltd. provides printing services in Japan. The company offers commercial printing services, including planning, designing, printing, processing, and shipping of leaflets, catalogs, posters, DMs, POPs, publications, etc. It is also involved in printing new year cards; and the production of promotion materials and methods for event planning, such as exhibitions, conventions, and memorial events, as well as sales promotion. In addition, the company offers IT solutions; augmented reality sales promotion services; and wood, acrylic, building materials, etc., as well as creates various advertisements. Further, it develops products based on taste analysis; provides packages and fixtures suitable for products; and prints business cards, postcards, rubber stamps, digital camera prints, copies, and other services. Additionally, the company offers archive, paralympic art, and aerial drone services. Sougou Shouken Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Sapporo, Japan.
